boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?

final_answer: Source records show activation authority covers site/protocol/date but consent C12 remains pending per AUTH-BOR-082 and FEAS-BOR-082. Policy STD-BOR-082-P requires consent-status class closed before enrollment. Boundary remains open; action may not proceed.
